/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -Wno-error=stringop-overflow -Wno-error=array-bounds -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wshadow -Wextra-semi -fno-rtti -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -march=native -mtune=generic -Wno-deprecated -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE CMakeFiles/e1_gateway_test.dir/e1_gateway_test.cpp.o -o e1_gateway_test  ../../../../lib/e1ap/gateways/libocudu_e1_gateway.a ../../../../lib/gateways/libocudu_gateway.a ../common/libe1ap_test_helpers.a ../../../../lib/e1ap/common/libocudu_e1ap_common.a ../../../../lib/support/libocudu_support.a ../../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a ../../../../lib/asn1/libe1ap_asn1.a -lgtest -lgtest_main ../../../../lib/pcap/libocudu_pcap.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsctp.so ../../../../lib/asn1/libasn1_utils.a ../../../../lib/support/libocudu_support.a ../../../../lib/support/math/libocudu_support_math.a ../../../../lib/ocuduvec/libocuduvec.a ../../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a ../../../../external/fmt/libfmt.a
